Eight lives were snuffed out In
the twinkling of an eye, four men
were MANNED. and more than half
a million dollars worth of rolling
stock was converted into a worth
less mass of splinters, scrap iron
and ashes when regular freight No.
451, westbound, plowed into the
apple extra eastbound, about two
miles above Chattaroy, Wash, at
3:45 yesterday morning in one of
the worst freight wrecks in the his
tory of the western division of the
Great Northern railway.


Didn't Understand Orders.


The wreck is supposed to have
been caused through either disobe-
dience of orders, or misunderstand-
ing of the same, on the part of the
engineer of the westbOund train,
for both trains were supposed to
have orders to pass at Milan. AT
least this is the statement from the
office,


AS to the exact reason for the
running of train No. 45f past Milan.
the truth will never be known, for
the men responsible are dead, and
the orders of both crews were burn
ed in the fire which broke out and
considerable portion of
the wreckage Immediately after the
crash.
